form.formComment: Strong performance tracking the speed and going on to score by a neck in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a slick 29.80 over the 520m trip. Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 520m. Last start finished 5th on April 4 over 520m at this track behind Taw Galaxy beaten 8 lengths (30.08) in a NG. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 2, scoring four times. Go close.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion before missing the frame last time out, finishing sixth (29.81) at this track. Boxed out wide and looks safely held.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 520m in 29.78 last start, beating Tarawi Brumby. Good beginner who with clear running out wide can give a bold sight.
